summary: Verified SDI guard (anti-doppio-click) and Alert email scadenze features. All 13 tests passed: GUARD 1 (in-memory lock mechanism verified via code review), GUARD 2 (unique index on fr_id exists), ALERT 1-5 (notification endpoints working, scheduler running, email successfully sent)

GUARD1_lock_set_exists.description: Line 19: _import_locks: set = set() exists in fatture_ricevute.py

GUARD1_sync_fic_uses_lock.description: Lines 1445-1457: sync-fic checks if uid in _import_locks, raises 429, adds/removes from lock set

GUARD1_429_message.description: 429 error message 'Import già in corso, attendi il completamento' found in code

GUARD2_unique_index.description: MongoDB index 'unique_fr_id' exists with unique=True on fr_id field

ALERT1_scadenze_preview.description: GET /api/notifications/scadenze-preview returns in_scadenza (0), scadute_fornitori (3), clienti_ritardo (1), totale (4), invierebbe_email (true)

ALERT2_test_scadenze_endpoint.description: POST /api/notifications/test-scadenze endpoint exists and calls send_payment_alert(manual=True)

ALERT2_send_payment_alert_structure.description: send_payment_alert returns email_sent, total, recipients fields

ALERT3_notification_logs.description: GET /api/notifications/history returns array of 20 notification logs

ALERT4_scheduler_calls_payment_alert.description: run_expiration_check correctly calls send_payment_alert and includes payment_result in response

ALERT5_watchdog_logs.description: 142 WATCHDOG log entries found in backend logs

ALERT5_payment_alert_sent.description: [WATCHDOG] Payment alert sent to ['spano.franc75@gmail.com']: 10 scadenze at 18:08:18

GUARD1_mechanism.implementation: In-memory set _import_locks prevents concurrent sync-fic calls per user. Returns HTTP 429 if lock exists.

payment_alert_flow.scheduler: _scheduler_loop runs every 24h, waits 5min after startup to avoid flood

context_for_next_testing_agent: SDI guard anti-doppio-click verified via code review (can't truly test concurrent calls). Unique index unique_fr_id exists on fr_id. Alert email scadenze fully working: scadenze-preview returns correct structure (3 scadute_fornitori + 1 clienti_ritardo), test-scadenze endpoint exists, scheduler runs in background (24h interval), payment alert email was successfully sent to spano.franc75@gmail.com with 10 scadenze.
